title: 修复发布证据与 release tag 一致性

sources.reason: Current distribution check validates supply-chain digests from the mutable worktree instead of the inspected release tag.
Existing release distribution tests and fake Git fixtures.
Declares the release tag and supply-chain evidence digests that must describe the same immutable unit.
Defines the public distribution and release evidence consistency acceptance requirements.

riskAssessment.reason: The checker must fail closed when release metadata claims evidence that is absent or different in the inspected tag, without accepting mutable worktree files as substitutes.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: A tag containing release.json and all claimed evidence files passes digest validation from the tag checkout.
A tag missing a claimed lock, SBOM, or provenance file fails even when the current worktree contains that file.
Tag-scoped anonymous distribution validation remains independent of ambient Git credentials and repository state.

executionDecision.reason: The reported mismatch is reproducible from the current checker design and can be corrected with tag-scoped fixture validation.

preReviewWarnings: Verify that the checker reads every claimed release evidence file from the inspected tag and never falls back to the current worktree.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: A release tag checkout is the sole source for release.json, requirements-dev.lock, SBOM, and provenance validation.
The checker fails closed when any claimed evidence file is absent from the inspected tag or its digest disagrees with tag release.json.
Regression tests prove current-worktree evidence cannot satisfy a tag missing the same evidence.
The release evidence and tag consistency result is recorded without rewriting historical tags.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: release.json currently claims supply-chain evidence from the current worktree even when the inspected public release tag does not contain those files, allowing a mutable checkout to masquerade as historical release evidence.
constraints: Historical tags remain immutable and are not rewritten by this Work Item.
The public distribution check must remain anonymous and fail closed.
Current-worktree evidence must never satisfy a tag-scoped release assertion.
intent.rationale: Reading all release claims and evidence from one tag checkout makes the release unit auditable and prevents branch-local files from being reported as properties of an older published tag.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly requested the remediation loop to continue until all listed review blockers are completed.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
